items.name: A.R.C. Data Shard
items.flavor: Encrypted. Probably important. Definitely unreadable.

items.name: A.R.C. Data Shard (Corrupted)
items.flavor: Contains 98% static and 2% screaming.

items.name: A.R.C. Data Shard (Prime Archive)
items.flavor: You feel smarter just holding it. Briefly.

items.name: Unstable Energy Core
items.flavor: Vibrates ominously. You vibrate back.

items.name: Spent Energy Core
items.flavor: Completely drained. Same.

items.name: Overcharged Energy Core
items.flavor: Hums loudly. Too loudly.

items.name: Singularity Core
items.flavor: Feels heavier than it should. Concerningly so.

items.name: Prototype Chip (Unknown)
items.flavor: A.R.C. engineers labeled it 'Do Not Touch.' You touched it.

items.name: Prototype Chip (Faulty)
items.flavor: It sparks occasionally. You pretend not to notice.

items.name: Prototype Chip (Forbidden)
items.flavor: You hear faint whispers when you hold it.

items.name: A.R.C. Encrypted Drive
items.flavor: Requires a password. The password field is 64 characters long.

items.name: A.R.C. Encrypted Drive (Broken)
items.flavor: Contains exactly one intact file: 'notes.txt'. It's empty.

items.name: A.R.C. Master Encryption Drive
items.flavor: You shouldn't have this. A.R.C. would like it back.

items.name: Nanite Canister (Low Density)
items.flavor: The nanites inside seem bored.

items.name: Nanite Canister (Standard)
items.flavor: They swirl aggressively when shaken.

items.name: Nanite Canister (Swarm Intelligence)
items.flavor: They tap on the glass. You tap back.

items.name: A.R.C. Relay Node
items.flavor: Boosts signal strength and paranoia.

items.name: A.R.C. Relay Node (Broken)
items.flavor: Still tries to connect to something. Anything.

items.name: A.R.C. Relay Node (Prime)
items.flavor: Connects to networks that shouldn't exist.

items.name: Quantum Stabilizer
items.flavor: Keeps reality from wobbling. Mostly.

items.name: Quantum Stabilizer (Faulty)
items.flavor: Reality wobbles slightly when you hold it.

items.name: Quantum Stabilizer (Perfect)
items.flavor: Reality feels smoother around you.

items.name: A.R.C. Power Cell
items.flavor: Holds enough power to run a small outpost. Or explode.

items.name: A.R.C. Power Cell (Spent)
items.flavor: Completely drained. Same.

items.name: A.R.C. Power Cell (Prime)
items.flavor: You feel a faint heartbeat. Probably fine.

items.name: Experimental Fuse
items.flavor: Designed to fail in interesting ways.

items.name: A.R.C. Experimental Fuse
items.flavor: The label reads: 'Not for field use.'

items.name: Experimental Fuse (Catastrophic)
items.flavor: You feel like you're holding a mistake.

items.name: A.R.C. Memory Core
items.flavor: Contains memories. Not yours.

items.name: A.R.C. Memory Core (Fragmented)
items.flavor: Shows random images when shaken.

items.name: Memory Core (Eternal)
items.flavor: You see flashes of a life you never lived.

items.name: A.R.C. Logic Module
items.flavor: Processes logic faster than you process emotions.

items.name: A.R.C. Logic Module (Faulty)
items.flavor: Makes decisions at random. Bold.

items.name: A.R.C. Logic Module (Prime)
items.flavor: Thinks faster than you can blink.

items.name: A.R.C. Flux Regulator
items.flavor: Regulates flux. Whatever that means.

items.name: A.R.C. Flux Regulator (Broken)
items.flavor: Regulates nothing. Looks cool.

items.name: Flux Regulator (Perfect)
items.flavor: You feel the universe settle slightly.
